archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
aesthetic_rationale: For this internal B2B consulting ticketing dashboard, we are rejecting generic SaaS 'purple/indigo' styles. Instead, we use 'Tactile Utility'—a serious, calm, information-dense aesthetic inspired by tools like Linear and Height. The palette relies on warm off-whites, bone, and deep graphite/muted blue to convey authority and efficiency, while structural layout relies on sharp, clean grids (Swiss principles).

typography.instructions: Avoid Inter/Roboto. We use a high-contrast pairing of a sharp, modern sans for headings and a sterile, highly legible sans for data.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for the dashboard. High density. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, w-64, bg-[#F2F0EA], border-r border-[#E5E2DC]. Very dense navigation items, 4px vertical gap, 8px padding.
spacing_and_layout.header: Sticky top header. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-[#FAF9F6]/80. 1px bottom border border-[#E5E2DC]. Height: 64px.
spacing_and_layout.content_area: Generous spacing around main wrappers. p-6 md:p-8.
spacing_and_layout.cards_and_panels: Strict rectangular geometry. rounded-lg, flat bg-white, 1px border-[#E5E2DC], no soft drop shadows to maintain the brutalist/utility edge.

buttons.primary: bg-[#3A4B59] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#2C3A45] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1C1C1C] border border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#F2F0EA] transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#D9534F] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-colors

components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border-none. Use the status background and text colors defined in colors.status.
components.tables: Dense layout. left-aligned headers. py-3 px-4 per cell. border-b border-[#E5E2DC]. Hover effect on rows: bg-[#FAF9F6].
components.inputs: bg-white border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-md text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3A4B59]/20 focus:border-[#3A4B59].
components.ticket_detail_view: Two-column layout. Left (70%): Conversation/Comments thread, rich text editor. Right (30%): Meta sidebar (Assignee, Status, Priority, Department) in a sticky card.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Row highlights in tables, slight border darken on cards. Subtle scale-up on icons.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and inputs.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text colors pass APCA over their respective backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, table rows, form inputs, tabs) MUST include data-testid. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='create-ticket-button', data-testid='ticket-row-123').

icons_and_libraries.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Preferred for dense dashboards and developer tools. Use Duotone or Regular weights.
icons_and_libraries.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts for the Admin Reports (Tickets by department, trends).

company_logo.description: Minimalist ampersand logo symbol for the consulting firm branding (use in login and sidebar header)

login_hero.description: Abstract architectural lines, use as a subtle side-panel background image on the login page (50% width split screen)

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' or generic sans fonts. Apply 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text globally.
Prioritize flat, distinct borders for cards and tables over soft blurred drop-shadows. The tool must look sharp and tactile.
Ensure the Dashboard uses the 'Control Room' dense grid approach for KPIs.
Implement a split-screen layout for the Login page: one side form with Google OAuth, one side the abstract architectural background image.
Use Phosphor icons consistently across the sidebar navigation and action buttons.
The admin dashboard must include recharts for data visualization (reports, trends).
Include 'data-testid' attributes on ALL actionable items. This is a strict requirement for automation.
